explanations.1: This exports a function that returns an object; the function itself is what Node.js will load when you require this file.
explanations.4: The `async` keyword means this function will do something that takes time, and we'll wait for it to finish before moving on.
explanations.5: The `actions.addRoute` call tells Docusaurus to create a new page route; anything after `/blog/tags/` will be captured as the `tag` variable.
